text: 『採掘基地防衛戦：終焉』について

r>新型フォトン粒子砲で【若人】を
倒すことができます。全ての拠点を
破壊されないように防衛しましょう。

全ての拠点を破壊されるとクエストが
失敗となりますので、ご注意ください。

今回の作戦は熾烈な戦いになることが
予測されます。

A.I.S.や拠点の支援効果を
惜しむことなく使用し
拠点を守りきってください！

In this defense battle, your objective is to destroy the Apprentices lurking
underground while defending three strongholds.

As long as at least one stronghold remains standing, you can destroy Apprentices
with the new Photon Particle Cannon. Don't neglect your defense, because if
all three strongholds get destroyed, you will fail the quest.

Damoths are small Falspawn that attack in swarms, doing major damage to
strongholds and AISes. They should never go ignored. Make effective use of the
strongholds' Burst Barrier support function to reduce damage.

AIS Exodas have been sighted. These are hostile, Falspawn-corrupted AISes.
You can shut down the AIS Exoda's powerful attacks by destroying its weapons.
Corrupted AISes have hugely boosted performance by ARKS AIS standards,
so exercise caution and work together to defeat them.

This operation is expected to result in some fierce fighting.
Don't be afraid to utilize AISes and stronghold supports to their
fullest to defend your position.
